scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun build src/cli/index.ts --target=bun --outfile=/tmp/apppilot-check.js && bun build src/mcp/server.ts --target=bun --outfile=/tmp/apppilot-mcp-check.js && bun build src/mcp-call/index.ts --target=bun --outfile=/tmp/apppilot-mcp-call-check.js
scripts.build:agent: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/skills dist/tools && bun build src/cli/index.ts --target=bun --compile --outfile=dist/apppilot && bun build src/mcp/server.ts --target=bun --compile --outfile=dist/apppilot-mcp && bun build src/mcp-call/index.ts --target=bun --compile --outfile=dist/apppilot-mcp-call && cp -R skills/apppilot-mcp dist/skills/apppilot-mcp && cp src/adapter/unity/tools/AppPilotUnityBuild.cs dist/tools/AppPilotUnityBuild.cs
